rdf:Property.rdfs:label: object
rdf:Property.rdfs:comment: The value of the asserted fact. The object can be expressed as a URI, a literal value, or a structured JSON-LD value.

rdfs:Class.rdfs:label: Assertion Credential
rdfs:Class.rdfs:comment:
A Verifiable Credential that expresses a factual statement about an identifiable subject as a subject, predicate, and object.
Assertion credentials use predicates to represent domain-specific facts, such as licences, compliance statuses, capabilities, or authorities, without introducing specialised credential schemas for each fact type.

rdf:Property.rdfs:label: predicate
rdf:Property.rdfs:comment: The property or relationship being asserted about the subject.

rdf:Property.rdfs:label: scope
rdf:Property.rdfs:comment: The context, zone, policy, or other resource within which the assertion applies.

rdf:Property.rdfs:label: subject
rdf:Property.rdfs:comment: The identifiable subject the fact is asserted about.

rdf:Property.rdfs:label: supporting evidence
rdf:Property.rdfs:comment: A resource that supports or documents the asserted fact.
